response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile senior engineer with nearly two decades of shipping experience, deep TypeScript/Node expertise, and directly relevant recent work on MCP servers and agentic-workflow tooling — a rare and valuable signal for this role. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions, and his AI-specific experience only begins in 2025; there is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, evaluation pipelines, LLM optimization, or Python, all core to the job. He reads as an excellent staff-level generalist rather than the seasoned applied-GenAI practitioner the role specifies.
strengths: Hands-on MCP and agentic-workflow infrastructure work at current role, directly matching key technologies
17+ years of production engineering across web, backend, and high-throughput distributed systems with strong TypeScript depth
Demonstrated teaching, workshops, and open-source leadership suggesting customer-facing and mentoring ability
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions (roughly 1 year of GenAI work)
No evidence of RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation/observability, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
Python absent from skills and experience; cloud AI-system design experience is thin (AWS CDK for pricing, not AI workloads)

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI solutions experience vs 8-year requirement
Recent MCP and agentic tooling experience
Missing RAG/vector DB and LLM evaluation expertise
